content: The past week has been rather quiet. Several things to think about, nothing to talk about. So why don't I just play with [this theme](http://www.upstartblogger.com/upstart-blogger-wordpress-theme-voluptua). Temporary, of course. Oh my god, temporary is quick. I'm going back to my old theme. -"- ### ADDITION OK, I have something to talk about. Right now my Macbook is down to 0% battery. It has been at 0% for about 15 minutes already. I guess this is the reason why we do need to [calibrate the battery](http://support.apple.com/kb/HT1490). And it would be back to full 100% health afterward, or 0%, which means dead. :P And the Macbook shut down immediately after I clicked on "Update Post". Cool. NOTE: I'm not following the steps on Apple's website and I hope it wouldn't kill my battery. Can't wait 5 hours because I want to go to bed now!
